/usr/bin/clang++ --coverage -O3 -g -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -march=native -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SparseTeste.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SparseTeste.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o SparseTeste   -L/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib:/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake-build-debug-coverage/DW_Decomp:/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake-build-debug-coverage/Grafo" ../DW_Decomp/libDwDecompd.so ../Grafo/libGrafo.so -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
